title: Ce cochon de Morin
writer: Nicolas Rimsky, Viktor Tourjansky, Guy de Maupassant
actors: Nicolas Rimsky, Denise Legeay, Louis Monfils
plot: Mr. Morin, a peaceful shopkeeper, meets a young girl named Henriette on a train back to La Rochelle. He makes a pass at her and she calls a policeman to the rescue. Morin asks his friend Labarbe, a newspaper editor, to settle the ...
